title: ANSIO Shower Curtain for Bathroom - Mould and Mildew Resistant - Charcoal Grey, 180 x 180 cm (71 x 71 Inch) | Water Repellent Fabric | 100% Polyester
features: Premium Quality Shower Curtain: Luxurious and ready-to-hang shower curtain, crafted from 100% polyester, ensuring a superior feel and long-lasting durability. This stylish piece comes in Charcoal Grey color, perfect for complementing your bathroom decor.

Anti Mould and Water Repellent: Our shower curtains are mould proof resistant, designed to maintain a fresh and clean environment. The water repellent properties ensure that the curtain dries quickly, reducing the risk of mold and mildew formation.

Comprehensive Coverage: Measuring 180cm x 180cm, our bath curtains provide full coverage for your shower or bathtub. Whether used as bathroom curtains or bath curtains, these are ideal for maintaining privacy and keeping water in its place.

Easy Care and Maintenance: For best results, immerse the shower curtain in lukewarm water before hanging to remove creases. It's machine washable, promoting easy care and longevity. For routine cleaning, simply wipe with a soft cloth or sponge. If needed, you can iron it on low settings to keep it looking crisp and neat.

Includes Durable Hooks: Every shower curtain comes with 12 hard-wearing plastic hooks, ensuring a quick and hassle-free setup. With these complimentary hooks, our curtains for shower are a practical and convenient addition to any bathroom.
